com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx

Interface DataDeserializer

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    MiBinaryDataDeserializer, MiXmlDataDeserializer, PlatformBinaryDataDeserializer, PlatformJsonDataDeserializer, PlatformSsvDataDeserializer, PlatformXmlDataDeserializer

    public interface DataDeserializer

    Read particular format data(stream) from InputStream or Reader, and transform to PlatformData.

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      PlatformData readData(java.io.InputStream in, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, java.lang.String charset)
      Read particular format data(stream) from InputStream, and transform to PlatformData.
      PlatformData readData(java.io.Reader in, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, java.lang.String charset)
      Read particular format data(stream) from Reader, and transform to PlatformData.
      void setProperty(java.lang.String key, java.lang.Object value)
      Set property value.

      • readData

        PlatformData readData(java.io.InputStream in,
                      DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                      java.lang.String charset)
               throws PlatformException
        Read particular format data(stream) from InputStream, and transform to PlatformData.
        Parameters:
        in - InputStream
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        charset - character set
        Returns:
        PlatformData
        Throws:
        PlatformException

      • readData

        PlatformData readData(java.io.Reader in,
                      DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                      java.lang.String charset)
               throws PlatformException
        Read particular format data(stream) from Reader, and transform to PlatformData.
        Parameters:
        in - Reader
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        charset - character set
        Returns:
        PlatformData
        Throws:
        PlatformException
